items.summary: Update the backend chatbot behavior so that when a user asks about symptoms (e.g., fever, headache, cold), the system returns a simple, non-diagnostic response that (1) acknowledges the symptoms, (2) provides safe next-step guidance (self-care + monitoring), (3) lists clear red-flag symptoms that require urgent care, and (4) recommends an appropriate doctor specialization based on a symptom→specialization mapping.

Enhance the backend chatbot response to recommend doctors from the existing seeded doctor directory by including at least one matching doctor name (and their specialization) when the recommended specialization exists in the current doctor list.

Make the backend chatbot HTTP outcall construction safe for user-entered text by URL-encoding the user question before building the request URL, to prevent broken requests for spaces/special characters.
Ensure the frontend chatbot UI cleanly displays the updated guidance + doctor recommendation text returned by the backend (multi-paragraph, readable formatting), without showing raw/debug output.
